title: Netherite Totem Of Undying
description: This resource pack changes the texture of the totem of undying to a netherite one.
body:
# Netherite Totem of Undying
Upgrade your survival game with ultimate style! This resource pack transforms the classic Totem of Undying into a sleek Netherite Totem of Undying, giving it a powerful, endgame look that matches your Netherite gear.

### Why download it?

- Epic Design: A dark, premium aesthetic that feels worthy of the strongest material in Minecraft.
- Perfect for Hardcore Players: Adds a sense of prestige and strength to your life-saving item.
- Lightweight & Compatible: Works flawlessly with other resource packs and shaders.

Survive in style, because even immortality deserves an upgrade!

## Terms of Use

You are free to use this resource pack in Minecraft, your videos, and your modpacks.

If you include it in a modpack or showcase it in a video, I would appreciate it if you add a link to this page in the description.

_**Do not redistribute or claim the pack as your own.**_
